allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/c/my-projects/mock-civic-test/static/data/questions.json'\)\); qs=d['questions']; print\('Total questions:', len\(qs\)\); topics={q['topic'] for q in qs}; print\('Topics:', len\(topics\)\); mcq=sum\(1 for q in qs if q['type']=='mcq'\); print\('MCQ:', mcq, '| Open:', len\(qs\)-mcq\)")
